value.title: Problem #6/#8 · LLM error rate elevated
value.description: LLM call error rate crossed the threshold (invalid-model / rate-limit / upstream failures).

input.value: fetch spans | filter isNotNull(gen_ai.request.model) | makeTimeseries total = count(), errors = countIf(span.status_code == "ERROR"), interval:1m | fieldsAdd error_rate = (errors[] / total[]) * 100 | fieldsRemove total, errors

properties.value:
LLM call error rate crossed the threshold (invalid-model / rate-limit / upstream failures).

Threshold: {threshold}, condition: {alert_condition}.
